productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Black Football Offense Backpack
description: Black backpack with a Nike swoosh in the front Two padded shoulder straps, one short handle on top and padded back One main zippered compartment with an internal zippered mesh pocket One padded zippered at the back for your laptop of size up to 17" One boot compartment at the bottom which extends upwards into the main compartment Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)
